query:
INSERT INTO sessions (
            id,
            project_id,
            task_id,
            model_id,
            agent_type,
            started_at,
            status,
            tokens_in,
            tokens_out
        )
        VALUES (
            ?,
            ?,
            ?,
            'test-model',
            'worker',
            DATE_FORMAT(NOW(3), '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s.%fZ'),
            'completed',
            0,
            0
        )
